name: Apple Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 4 cups apple slices; thinly sliced, peeled, about 2 1/2 apples
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Combine crumbs, 3 tablespoons sugar, 1/2 teaspoon cinnamon, and margarine in a small bowl; mix well. Press onto the bottom and up the sides of a 9-inch pie plate. Bake crust for 10 minutes.
3. Beat together cream cheese and 1/2 cup sugar in a large bowl until well blended. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Blend in vanilla; pour into crust. Combine remaining 1/2 teaspoon cinnamon and 1/3 cup sugar in a large bowl. Add apples; toss gently to coat. Spoon apple mixture over cream cheese mixture. Sprinkle with pecans.
4. Bake for 1 hour and 10 minutes or until set. Loosen cake from the rim of the pan; cool before removing the rim of the pan. Refrigerate.
